title: MC Java x MC Dungeons
description: The pack that actually turns Minecraft java into Minecraft Dungeons
body:
**Thank you for over 5,000 downloads!**

# MC Java x MC Dungeons
Enter a new verison of Minecraft with MC Java x MC Dungeons, a modpack that fuses the classic sandbox gameplay of Minecraft Java Edition with the epic adventure of Minecraft Dungeons.

Discover a vast world full of dungeons, secrets, and loot, where you can use weapons, armors, and artifacts from Minecraft Dungeons. Craft your own unique gear, enchant it with powerful effects, and face off against challenging bosses and enemies.

Stay tuned for a sequel/remake of this modpack in the near future... maybe, if I get around to it lol
